^(cache_control)$.description:
CacheControl specifies caching attributes that services may use
 when serving the blob.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Cache-Control

^(content_disposition)$.description:
ContentDisposition specifies whether the blob content is expected to be
 displayed inline or as an attachment.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Disposition

^(content_encoding)$.description:
ContentEncoding specifies the encoding used for the blob's content, if any.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Encoding

^(content_language)$.description:
ContentLanguage specifies the language used in the blob's content, if any.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Language

^(content_type)$.description:
ContentType is the MIME type of the blob. It will not be empty.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Type

^(create_time)$.description:
CreateTime is the time the blob was created, if available. If not available,
 CreateTime will be the zero time.

^(mod_time)$.description: ModTime is the time the blob was last modified.

cacheControl.description:
CacheControl specifies caching attributes that services may use
 when serving the blob.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Cache-Control

contentDisposition.description:
ContentDisposition specifies whether the blob content is expected to be
 displayed inline or as an attachment.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Disposition

contentEncoding.description:
ContentEncoding specifies the encoding used for the blob's content, if any.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Encoding

contentLanguage.description:
ContentLanguage specifies the language used in the blob's content, if any.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Language

contentType.description:
ContentType is the MIME type of the blob. It will not be empty.
 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Type

createTime.description:
CreateTime is the time the blob was created, if available. If not available,
 CreateTime will be the zero time.

etag.description: ETag for the blob; see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_ETag.

key.description: Key of blob of retrieved attributes.

md5.description: MD5 is an MD5 hash of the blob contents or nil if not available.

metadata.description:
Metadata holds key/value pairs associated with the blob.
 Keys are guaranteed to be in lowercase, even if the backend service
 has case-sensitive keys (although note that Metadata written via
 this package will always be lowercased). If there are duplicate
 case-insensitive keys (e.g., "foo" and "FOO"), only one value
 will be kept, and it is undefined which one.

modTime.description: ModTime is the time the blob was last modified.

size.description: Size is the size of the blob's content in bytes.
